case_title: JOHN LONERGAN VS. PHILLIP ROBERTSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,950.00 FILED BY LONERGAN, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, PHILLIP GHOSH, ANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: PLAINTIFF'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LONERGAN, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-16-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GHOSH, ANNA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-17-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, PHILLIP

APPEARANCES BY ALL PARTIES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE DEFENDANTS, PHILLIP ROBERTSON AND ANNA GHOSH, MAKES AN ORAL REQUEST FOR A DISMISSAL OF PLAINTIFF'S, JOHN LONERGAN, CLAIM DUE TO IT BEING FILED PREMATURELY. THE COURT GRANTS THE REQUEST. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-17-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIP ROBERTSON AND ANNA GHOSH AND DEFENDANT JOHN LONERGAN. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CROSS COMPLAINT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED - PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF HAS FILED HIS CLAIM PRIOR TO ACTUALLY SUFFERING ANY DAMAGE. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO REFILE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE: $50.00) SERVED OCT-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PLAINTIFF LONERGAN, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2017 -TO JAN-17-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 TO BE HEARD WITH RELATED CASE CSM-16-853688 CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT JOHN LONERGAN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS/CROSS COMPLAINANTS PHILLIP ROBERTSON AND ANNA GHOSH ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT JOHN LONERGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANTS PHILLIP ROBERTSON AND ANNA GHOSH ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ROBERTSON, PHILLIP GHOSH, ANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LONERGAN, JOHN PLAINTIFF EXHIBTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,247.83 FILED BY ROBERTSON, PHILLIP GHOSH, ANNA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LONERGAN, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
